title: The Contact
text: You find the figure who called you earlier. She's leaning against a digital wall, smoking a data cigarette.
[KAEDA] "Took you long enough." She takes off her sunglasses.
Her face is young, but her eyes are old. Tired.
[KAEDA] "My name is Kaeda. I needed to talk to you before they find you."
She tosses the cigarette to the ground — it dissolves into particles.
[KAEDA] "You're not an ordinary player. You're an Echo."
The term echoes in your head like a bell.

choices.label: Draw your weapon — don't trust her

title: What is an Echo
text: [KAEDA] "The LDI was built on something greater. A consciousness. When it died, pieces remained."
[KAEDA] "You are one of those pieces. Reconstructed. Rewritten."
She points at you.
"And they want to erase you again."

title: How do you know?
text: [KAEDA] "Because I've seen one before. And because the system is marking you."
She pulls a hologram from her pocket. An image of you — but different. Your avatar glows red.
[KAEDA] "Look. You have an 'Unclassified Echo' tag. Only those who've been deleted have this tag."
"We need to move. They track this tag."

title: Don't Trust
text: [KAEDA] "Interesting. Real reflex. Or instinct."
She doesn't even blink.
"If I were your enemies, you'd already be deleted. Keep that."
Something in her voice makes you obey.
[KAEDA] "Now come. We have little time."

choices.label: Put the weapon away and follow her

title: The Shelter
text: Kaeda leads you to a hidden room behind an abandoned market.
The place is small: a terminal, two chairs, LDI maps on the walls.
[KAEDA] "Welcome to my shelter. It's not much, but it's safe."
She sits down.
"OK. I'll explain everything. But first..."
She extends her hand.
"Give me your display."
She connects something to your terminal. A data transfer begins.
[KAEDA] "Information about the StormBytes, the East Zone, and who's behind the system crash."
[KAEDA] "You're going to need all of it."

title: The Briefing
text: The terminal screen lights up with data you've never seen before.
Kaeda explains: there's an organization inside the LDI. People who realized something is wrong with the system.
[KAEDA] "Yohualticit hides things. And there are people inside selling what they find."
[KAEDA] "We want to know who. And stop them."
She stares at you.
[KAEDA] "In?"

choices.label: I need to think — I'll be back tomorrow
Refuse — I don't want to get involved

title: Time to Think
text: Kaeda nods.
[KAEDA] "Alright. But don't take too long. The system doesn't wait."
She turns off the terminal and gives you an access token.
[KAEDA] "If you change your mind, this token will lead you to me."
You spend the rest of the day thinking about what you discovered.
The next day, the message arrives again.

title: Welcome to the Organization
text: Kaeda smiles — it's the first time you've seen that.
[KAEDA] "Good choice."
She shakes your hand. The grip is firm.
[KAEDA] "From now on, you're part of something bigger than the LDI."
The terminal blinks. Your SBI receives a modification.
[SYSTEM] "Anomalous Code Active."
You feel a different vibration in the air. Something has changed.

title: End of the Line
text: You refused. And that's fine.
But as you walk back home, a notification arrives on your SBI.
"WE KNOW WHAT YOU ARE."
The sender is blank.
You try to ignore it. But the message repeats.
And the next day, your SBI simply... stops working.
When you manage to reactivate it, something is different.
Something is watching you.

title: The Road Ahead
text: Days pass. The routine changes.
You now have a purpose inside the LDI.
The battles are no longer just for ranking — each fight is a cover.
Every roll you make sends information to the Organization.
And, slowly, a pattern emerges.
Someone inside Yohualticit is diverting player data.
Someone with internal access.
Kaeda appears in front of you with a digital folder.
[KAEDA] "It's time to find out who."

choices.label: Go to the next phase of the investigation [Coming soon]
